name: Spur-of-The-Moment Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, combine the basil leaves, garlic, chives, parmesan cheese, anchovies, salt, and black pepper.
2. Add 1/2 cup of olive oil to the blender.
3. Blend at low speed until a puree consistency is achieved.
4. Drizzle in the remaining olive oil while blending at low speed until fully incorporated.
5. Add the minced chicken and process for no more than five seconds.
6. Add the pecan pieces and process for another five seconds; ensure the chicken and pecans remain identifiable.
7. Serve as a sauce for pasta salad or hot pasta.
